iron_key.name: iron key
iron_key.description: A small iron key. The bow is cast in the shape of a hare.

copper_key.name: copper key
copper_key.description: A small copper key. Simpler in design than you'd expect.

oil_lamp.name: oil lamp
oil_lamp.description: A brass oil lamp. The reservoir is about half full.

writing_desk.name: writing desk
writing_desk.description: A large wooden desk. A faint ring left by some long-gone cup marks the surface.

desk_surface.name: desk surface
desk_surface.description: The writing surface of the desk.

desk_drawer.name: desk drawer
desk_drawer.description: A narrow drawer in the writing desk.

quill_pen.name: quill pen
quill_pen.description: A quill pen of dark feather. The nib is still sharp.

chest.name: small chest
chest.description: A small wooden chest secured with an iron lock.

passage_door.name: heavy door
passage_door.description: A heavy wooden door, iron-banded. A keyhole sits below the handle.
passage_door.specialDesc: A heavy wooden door stands to the east.

passage_door_b.name: heavy door
passage_door_b.description: A heavy wooden door, iron-banded. The handle is on the other side.
passage_door_b.specialDesc: A heavy wooden door stands to the west.

window.name: window
window.description: A narrow window set deep into the stone. Through the thick glass you can make out the drive and the low hedge beyond.
window.notImportantMsg: The window is sealed fast in its frame.

velvet_pouch.name: velvet pouch
velvet_pouch.description: A small velvet pouch, tied with a drawstring.
